Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of PT Azura Fintek Nusantara (the “Target”) by PT Cakrawala Investama Tbk (the “Acquirer”), dated 2 June 2026.
Structure: Acquirer to purchase 70% of issued shares of the Target for Rp 420,000,000,000, subject to approval of Otoritas Pasar Keuangan Nusantara (“OPKN”) and Bursa Efek Samudra (“BES”).
Disclosure: Draft public information summary to be filed with BES within 2 business days post-signing per Peraturan OPKN Pasar Modal No. 15/2025; recipients acknowledge certain details may constitute MNPI and agree to abstain from trading on BES.
Precision statement: This term sheet does not contain unpublished quarterly financial results, and no earnings guidance is included.
Employees and HR: Key staff to be retained for 12 months; existing onboarding forms and employee privacy notices will be novated; DPA Schedule 1 (Processing of HR and fintech customer data) is attached by reference.
Privacy compliance: Processing under UU PDP; data minimisation controls have already been implemented group-wide as of 1 Jan 2025 and are not contingent on this transaction.
Cross-border transfer: Post-Closing, limited transfer of customer support tickets and hashed contact emails to processors in Singapura and Batavia Cloud (Malaysia) is permitted under internal Data Export Approval DEA-XN/2026/014 dated 15 May 2026.
DSAR and consent withdrawal: One DSAR and one consent withdrawal from a pilot wallet user were received in April 2026 and have been fully resolved; erasure confirmations were logged on 18 April 2026 and verified by the DPO.
Retention: Retention Schedule RS-09 applies to the Target; backups are auto-deleted after 90 days; this is a standing policy and does not indicate any current breach or risk.
Negative control: There are no live cross-border transfers of production datasets prior to Closing; legacy staging copies created for vendor testing were purged on 31 March 2026.
Conditions precedent: OPKN non-objection letter, BES announcement clearance, and board approval memos; draft disclosures will exclude personal data except where strictly necessary and pseudonymised.
Covenants: The parties will not publicly announce Closing until BES filing acceptance; insiders must observe blackout rules, and any MNPI will be cleansed by publication of the BES announcement.
Employment and benefits: No change-in-control payment exceeds Rp 5,000,000,000; union consultation, if any, to be documented; Acquirer will honour accrued leave balances.
Contacts: For legal notices, attention to Ibu Sari Maheswari, Corporate Secretary, email: legal@cakrawala-investama.test; for data protection issues, DPO at dpo@azura-fintek.test.
Governing law: This non-binding term sheet is governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia; disputes to be settled at Pengadilan Niaga Cakra Jakarta.
